_note: PAINTED dark-fantasy lane (owner Chunk-6 verified, live). Checkpoint sdxlUnstableDiffusers_nihilmania (YamerMIX) + LoRA hkstyleV5 + LoRA add-detail-xl. quality intentionally EMPTY — YamerMIX needs no quality block. Paint words LEAD the positive via styleVocab; the weighted photo-ban lives in negativeBase.
laneRule: AGE LAW (nihilmania/YamerMIX): age must be stated WITH WEIGHT or the model defaults to ~22yo — e.g. '(middle-aged woman:1.3), (aged face:1.2)' in the positive PLUS 'young, youthful' in the negative. Slot values are plain-word only (no weights allowed), so this weighting is carried in the owner's exported graph and in this block's negativeBase, not via a template slot.
styleVocab: oil painting, painterly, fantasy illustration, visible brushstrokes, traditional media
negativeBase: lowres, worst quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, deformed, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, cartoon, flat colors, (photograph:1.3), (photorealistic:1.3), photo, dslr, skin pores, glossy, young, youthful
